description: Letter from Musa b. Yiṣḥaq b. Hisdai, Mahdiyya, to Yosef b. Ya’aqov b. Awkal, Fustat. The writer describes his difficulties with shipping flax. He is also worried because another person spoke with Ibn Awkal against the writer. Also mentions debts, donations, payments and other matters. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #192) VMR
description_he: מכתב ממוסא בן יצחק בן חסדאי, מהדייה, ליוסף בן יעקב בן עווקאל, על קשיי שיווק פשתן וחובות
